title: Schivereckia korabensis
taxonomy: Schivereckia korabensis is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae. It is native to Albania. The plant is also known as Korab bellflower. As a member of the Papaveraceae family, it is closely related to other plants such as poppies and meconopsis. Further classification of Schivereckia korabensis may involve its specific genus and species ranks within the Papaveraceae family.
